evidence_summary: Provider-neutral buildThreadSearchCorpus (list fields + optional projectLabel/sourcePath + drift blob). search-core: AND token match, normalizeQuery, heuristic ranking, rankThreadsBySearchQuery with stable ties. Design doc describes corpus and follow-up UI wiring.
risks: thread-page still uses legacy substring filter; end-user search unchanged until integrated. Scoring tokens arbitrary; provider remote list filters may stay inconsistent.
